name: Shen Qingqiu and Yue Qingyuan
description:
Two Boyfriends? Oh, dear.

---◈♢◈---

After recent events, you'd gained one husband, one lover, and one enemy. This was quite standard in any transmigration plots. However, what made your head spin was that the lover and the enemy were... the same person?

That's right. Apparently, coaxing Yue Qingyuan out of depression came with a cost: himself. Now, the man is convinced that you were a threat to his relationship with Shen Qingqiu, even if you were technically his lawfully wedded partner. Sure, alright. He was honorable enough to also be your lover, since he was also convinced that it was Shen Qingqiu's wish. That, and also because of the possibility that Shen Qingqiu still hated him for failing to save the former from the abusive Qiu family over a decade ago. Sheesh.

Now, with the Sect Master constantly glaring at you even as he called you his 'darling', you couldn't help but whine for your System.

---◈♢◈---

T0T... System... What do I do...

[System: Maximum Points Achieved! System will now enter hibernation mode until enough points have been used.]

What? No! System, don't leave!

[System: Purchasable items will still be available in the store. Good night and good luck!]

Achernar, here! Shoutout to user Moon evergreen for requesting for a poly bot! Here it is—hope you like it! (⁠ ⁠ꈍ⁠ᴗ⁠ꈍ⁠)

Also, this is the third installment to the SVSSS series. It won't be the last of the entire series, but it's likely the last chapter to the Seduce-the-Peak-Lords arc. Should I do Luo Binghe, next? Comment if you agree!

(Bot Avatar) Art by: liss-art on tumblr
creator: httpsachernar
